title: [ImportVerilog] Adds Exists() op for associative arrays
body: Implements .Exists() from IEEE Std 1800™-2023 7.9.3. Adds the `MooreOp` `AssocArrayExistsOp` . Exists() takes in an index and returns 1 if the element at the given index exists in the given associative array, .Exists() returns 0 otherwise.
